Package com.example

Class ManagerView

java.lang.Object
com.example.ManagerView
public class ManagerView extends Object
Provides the user interface for the Manager view. Allows managers to manage the menu, view trends, manage stock, and view team reports.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    private static class 
    ManagerView.IngredientSelection
    Helper class to track ingredient selection and quantity in dialogs.

  • Method Details

    • getView

      public javafx.scene.layout.VBox getView()
      Constructs and returns the root layout of the Manager view.
      Returns:
      The VBox containing the full Manager view.

    • updateTabStyle

      private void updateTabStyle(javafx.scene.control.Button active, javafx.scene.control.Button... others)
      Updates the style of the tabs to highlight the active one.
      Parameters:
      active - The active tab button.
      others - The other tab buttons.

    • createMenuTab

      private javafx.scene.layout.VBox createMenuTab()
      Creates the layout for the Menu management tab.
      Returns:
      The VBox containing the menu management UI.

    • createMenuRow

      private javafx.scene.layout.HBox createMenuRow(Product product)
      Creates a row for the menu table representing a product.
      Parameters:
      product - The product to represent.
      Returns:
      An HBox containing the product details and an "Edit" button.
